meta.title: Murilo Laba — Product Engineer & Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Murilo Laba — Product Engineer and founder of InovaAxis. Specializing in SaaS, AWS, React and React Native. Digital ecosystem for go-kart tracks in Brazil.

hero.name: Murilo Laba
hero.headline: Turning real-world challenges into scalable products
hero.subtitle: Product Engineer & Founder at InovaAxis. I build complete digital ecosystems — mobile, SaaS, desktop and cloud — with React, React Native, AWS and an execution-driven mindset.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Product Engineer based in Curitiba, Brazil — problem-solving oriented, autonomous and execution-driven.
about.bio1: I'm a Product Engineer and founder of InovaAxis, a company building digital solutions for go-kart tracks in Brazil. I built Kart Hub Experience — an ecosystem with a mobile app, SaaS platform, Electron timing software and live LAN display — plus medRenda, an income tracking app for healthcare professionals.
about.bio2: Computer Science graduate from Universidade Positivo, I combine full-stack engineering with product vision — UX/UI, roadmap management and B2B/B2C environments. Currently looking for remote opportunities where I can contribute to product development, engineering and strategy while continuing to scale my own business.
